sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: India's GDP growth to slow to 6.4 pc in 2025: Moody's Analytics - ETCFO
feed.summary: India's growth is anticipated to decelerate to 6.4% in 2025 from 6.6% in 2024, due to new US tariffs and weaker global demand affecting exports, according to Moody's Analytics. The report highlights a broader slowdown in the Asia-Pacific region, with China's GDP growth also decreasing.
